nodes.label: sanad-ar-compliance.png
nodes.description: UI screenshot of the Sanad compliance tracker view (متتبع الامتثال) in Arabic (RTL). Shows a Kanban-style card grid of 10 compliance items across 6 categories — residency (إقامة), commercial registry (سجل تجاري), contracts (عقد), licenses (رخصة), tax (ضريبة), and insurance (تأمينات). Cards are colour-coded by urgency: expired (red), <30 days (orange/pink), 30–90 days (amber), healthy (green). A sidebar nav links to Dashboard, Compliance (active, badge=4), Cases, Deep Work, Tasks, and Documents. A PWA install banner appears in the bottom-right corner. Footer reads: 'Sanad — daily operations dashboard for lawyers and small businesses in Saudi Arabia.'

nodes.label: Compliance Tracker View (متتبع الامتثال)
nodes.description: A dedicated view in the Sanad app for tracking renewal deadlines across legal and administrative compliance categories. Displays a summary row (expired / <30 days / 30-90 days / healthy), filter tabs by category, and a card grid. Each card shows entity name, category badge, expiry date, remaining days with a progress bar, optional action note, and a 'mark as renewed' button.

nodes.label: Compliance Urgency Colour Coding
nodes.description: Four-tier visual urgency system used on compliance cards: (1) منتهي / expired — red border; (2) أقل من 30 يوماً / <30 days — pink/orange highlight; (3) 30–90 يوماً / 30-90 days — amber; (4) سليم / healthy — green. Counts per tier are surfaced in a summary bar at the top of the view.

nodes.label: Compliance Item Categories
nodes.description: Six compliance categories tracked by the app: إقامة (residency permits), سجل تجاري (commercial registry), عقد (employment/work contracts), رخصة (professional licenses), ضريبة (tax filings — e.g. VAT Q2), and تأمينات (social insurance subscriptions). Counts in the screenshot: All=10, إقامة=3, سجل تجاري=2, عقد=2, رخصة=1, ضريبة=1, تأمينات=1.

nodes.label: Sanad Sidebar Navigation
nodes.description: Right-aligned Arabic sidebar with links to: لوحة التحكم (Dashboard), الامتثال (Compliance — active with badge 4), لوحة القضايا (Cases), العمل العميق (Deep Work), المهام (Tasks), المستندات (Documents). App branding 'سند / العمليات اليومية' shown top-right.

nodes.label: Sanad PWA Support
nodes.description: App is installable as a Progressive Web App (PWA). A toast/banner at bottom-right confirms installation with prompt to pin to desktop for daily access. Footer confirms local-server hosting with PWA enabled ('محتضن للخادم المحلي : PWA مُفعَّل').

nodes.label: Arabic RTL UI Design
nodes.description: The entire UI is rendered in Arabic with right-to-left (RTL) layout. Sidebar is on the right, content flows right-to-left, date/time headers are in Arabic numerals and Arabic calendar labels. Language toggle (EN / AR) is present in the top bar.
